description_long: This is a large, two-story house nestled within a dense cluster of snow-covered evergreen trees and surrounded by gently sloping, grassy mounds and boulders. The house features a green gable roof with multiple peaks, white exterior walls, and brown wooden paneling on the upper story. Several windows are visible, arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, and a prominent chimney rises from one side. A winding driveway leads up to the main entrance, which is partially obscured by trees but appears to have a small porch or overhang. The setting evokes a secluded, alpine or forested residential retreat, blending natural and architectural elements.
description: A large, two-story house with a green gable roof, white walls, and brown accents, surrounded by snow-covered evergreens and boulders. The house sits in a secluded, forested setting with a winding driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance partially hidden by trees, with the green gable roof and white walls most prominent.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the driveway curving toward the house, more of the brown upper story paneling, and the chimney.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the house, large boulders, and fewer visible windows, emphasizing the secluded setting.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, more of the house's side elevation, and the surrounding trees and boulders.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch or overhang, partially obscured by trees, likely featuring steps and a simple door.
